overview: Velora is a premium dating app with a dark-gold luxury aesthetic. Features Internet Identity login, UPI QR payment for premium, swipe/match/chat, 50 realistic demo profiles with auto-reply, verified gold badges, and full profile management.
features: Dedicated login page as first screen
Dedicated /upgrade payment page with UPI QR flow
50 realistic demo profiles seeded in backend
Auto-reply logic for demo profile messages
Profile picture and cover picture upload
Full profile management (name, bio, age, interests, photos, avatar, cover)
Premium upgrade via UPI QR honor-based payment
Verified gold badge for premium members
